issue.title: Patient Care Team Display Widget
issue.body:
## Summary
Clinicians need to quickly identify who else is involved in a patient's care without navigating away from the chart. A care team widget on the patient chart will surface this information at a glance.

## User Story
As a clinician, I want to see who is on a patient's care team so that I can coordinate care and know who to contact.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] The widget displays all active members of the patient's care team.
- [ ] Each member entry shows: full name, role/specialty, and a contact method (phone or email if available).
- [ ] If a contact method is not available for a member, that field is omitted gracefully (no broken UI).
- [ ] A loading skeleton is shown while care team data is being fetched.
- [ ] If the patient has no care team members, a clear "No care team assigned" message is displayed.
- [ ] If the data fetch fails, an error message is shown with an option to retry.
- [ ] The widget is read-only; no editing of care team members is in scope.

## Out of Scope
- Adding or removing care team members from this widget.
- Messaging or calling team members directly from the widget.

## Technical Notes
- Care team data should come from the relevant FHIR resources in the Medplum backend — the Medplum expert should determine the appropriate resource type(s) and access pattern.
- The widget must be compatible with `@medplum/react` theming.
